name: social-graph
summary: Follow / followers: follows table + RLS, optimistic follow/unfollow, counts and isFollowing, hook + FollowButton stub.
postInstall: Apply supabase/0010_follows.sql (public-read follows; you can only create/remove your own follow)
supabase db reset && supabase test db
Use useFollow(targetUserId) for an optimistic follow button + live counts.
Replace src/features/social/ui/follow-button.tsx after the Claude Design pass
